title: 大阪杯の後に・やるしかなくない？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finishing the race completely out of breath,
Tosen Jordan gets another taste of how intense
senior G1 competition can be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Annoyingly, Gold Ship doesn't seem the least bit
tired—in fact, she's yelling and screaming to get
the crowd riled up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fired up from her rivalry with Gold Ship, Tosen
Jordan no longer has any doubts in her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps realizing this, Gold Ship challenges her
to continue their rivalry in the spring Tenno Sho.
